figures.caption: Table 2: The default values and ranges of hyperparameters in the models.
Figure 1: Workflow for baseline modeling and estimating the counterfactual outcomes.

Table 1: Model performance in the IFX arm and odds ratio estimation of ADA patients for SFCR outcome. AUC: area under the ROC curve. ICI: integrated calibration index. OR: odds ratio estimate. LGBM: light gradient boosting machine. TabPFN: tabular prior-data fitted network. XGB: extreme gradient boosting. RF: random forest. LR: logistic regression. ARF: adversarial random fores. BN: Bayesian networks. CTGAN: conditional tabular generative adversarial network. TVAE: tabular variational autoencoder.
Figure 2: Workflow for augmented model performance and counterfactual estimation.
